{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant", "installed-defective"],
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "percent_complete": 95,
  "value": 0,
  "confidence": 0.95,

  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "T&P discharge pipe is missing",
    "T&P discharge pipe may be trapped (has bends or sags that capture water)",
    "T&P discharge pipe diameter reduced below relief valve outlet size",
    "T&P discharge pipe terminates too high above floor or receptor"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Do not operate water heater until T&P discharge piping is corrected",
    "Install full-size, rigid discharge pipe from T&P valve to within 6 in. of floor or to indirect waste receptor with air gap",
    "Ensure discharge pipe is not trapped, is pitched to drain, and has no shut-off valves or obstructions",
    "Verify termination complies with IPC 504.6, IRC P2804.6.1 and OEM instructions"
  ],
  "rationale": "T&P discharge piping missing, trapped, reduced, or terminating too high violates IPC 504.6/IRC P2804.6.1 and creates a scald/explosion hazard. Rough-complete stage does not waive life-safety requirements.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 504.6",
    "IRC P2804.6.1"
  ]
}
